sections.paragraph:
ἀηδία, ας, ἡ lit. ‘unpleasantness’ (so Demosth. et al.; UPZ 72, 8 [152 b.c.]; 119, 23; BGU 22, 14ff [s. further Preis. IV]; LXX Pr 23:29; Aq. Sym. Jer 15:10; Philo; Jos., Ant. 17, 307; TestDan 4:3) displeasure, ὄντες ἐν ἀηδίᾳ being at odds Lk 23:12 D (ἐν ἀ. εἶναι Ael. Aristid. 47, 10 K.=23 p. 447 D.).—DELG s.v. ἥδομαι. M-M.

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

Demosth Demosth , IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

UPZ UPZ = Urkunden der Ptolemäerzeit—Lists 4, 6

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

Preis. Preis. = FPreisigke, Wörterbuch der griech. Papyrusurkunden—Lists 4, 6

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Aq Aq , II a.d.—List 5

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

TestDan TestDan = Testament of Dan, s. Test12Patr—List 2

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Ael. Aristid. Ael. Aristid. = Aelius Aristides, II a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 23
